entries.source: Our Policy on “Do Not Track” Signals:
entries.value: keenna siyaasad ku “Do ma Track” Signals:

entries.source: Our Service allows you to post, link, store, share and otherwise make available certain information, text, graphics, videos, or other material (“Content”). You are responsible for Content that you post on or through Service, including its legality, reliability, and appropriateness. By posting Content on or through Service, You represent and warrant that: (i) Content is yours (you own it) and/or you have the right to use it and the right to grant us the rights and license as provided in these Terms, and (ii) that the posting of your Content on or through Service does not violate the privacy rights, publicity rights, copyrights, contract rights or any other rights of any person or entity. We reserve the right to terminate the account of anyone found to be infringing on a copyright. You retain any and all of your rights to any Content you submit, post or display on or through Service and you are responsible for protecting those rights. We take no responsibility and assume no liability for Content you or any third party posts on or through Service. However, by posting Content using Service you grant us the right and license to use, modify, publicly perform, publicly display, reproduce, and distribute such Content on and through Service. You agree that this license includes the right for us to make your Content available to other users of Service, who may also use your Content subject to these Terms. Great Indian Company (Holding Partnership Firm, GST: 29AAWFG7015K1ZQ) has the right but not the obligation to monitor and edit all Content provided by users. In addition, Content found on or through this Service are the property of Great Indian Company (Holding Partnership Firm, GST: 29AAWFG7015K1ZQ) or used with permission. You may not distribute, modify, transmit, reuse, download, repost, copy, or use said Content, whether in whole or in part, for commercial purposes or for personal gain, without express advance written permission from us.
entries.value: keenna adeeg allows aad si post, xiriiriye, store, share iyo otherwise samee la heli karo certain macluumaad, text, graphics, videos, ama other material (“nuxur”). aad waa responsible loogu talagalay nuxur taas aad post ku ama iyada oo loo marayo adeeg, including its legality, kalsooni-lahaansho, iyo appropriateness. By posting nuxur ku ama iyada oo loo marayo adeeg, aad represent iyo warrant taas: (i) nuxur waa taada (aad u gaar ah taas) iyo/ama aad hayso right si isticmaal taas iyo right si grant us xuquuq iyo license as provided gudaha kuwan shuruudo, iyo (ii) taas posting ee kaaga nuxur ku ama iyada oo loo marayo adeeg does ma violate privacy xuquuq, publicity xuquuq, copyrights, contract xuquuq ama kasta other xuquuq ee kasta qof ama entity. annaga reserve right si terminate account ee anyone found si noqo infringing ku copyright. aad retain kasta iyo dhammaan ee kaaga xuquuq si kasta nuxur aad submit, post ama display ku ama iyada oo loo marayo adeeg iyo aad waa responsible loogu talagalay protecting kuwaas xuquuq. annaga take no responsibility iyo assume no liability loogu talagalay nuxur aad ama kasta dhinac saddexaad posts ku ama iyada oo loo marayo adeeg. However, by posting nuxur isticmaalka adeeg aad grant us right iyo license si isticmaal, modify, si dadweyne perform, si dadweyne display, reproduce, iyo distribute such nuxur ku iyo iyada oo loo marayo adeeg. aad agree taas tan license ku jira right loogu talagalay us si samee kaaga nuxur la heli karo si other users ee adeeg, yaa waxaa laga yaabaa also isticmaal kaaga nuxur maaddo si kuwan shuruudo. Great Indian shirkad (Holding Partnership Firm, GST: 29AAWFG7015K1ZQ) leh right laakiin ma obligation si monitor iyo edit dhammaan nuxur provided by users. gudaha addition, nuxur found ku ama iyada oo loo marayo tan adeeg waa property ee Great Indian shirkad (Holding Partnership Firm, GST: 29AAWFG7015K1ZQ) ama used leh permission. aad waxaa laga yaabaa ma distribute, modify, transmit, reuse, download, repost, koobiye, ama isticmaal yiri nuxur, whether gudaha whole ama gudaha part, loogu talagalay commercial purposes ama loogu talagalay shakhsi ah gain, la'aan express advance written permission ka yimid us.

We strongly advise you to review the Privacy Policy of every site you visit. We assume no responsibility for the content, privacy policies or practices of any third party sites or services.

entries.source: Philosophy Lab
entries.value: Sheybaarka Falsafadda

entries.source: Philosophy Lab AI Learning Mode is a focused way to use AI for learning instead of passive answer collection. The mode is built around a specific job: Explore identity, knowledge, fairness, freedom, happiness, and other deep questions through careful reasoning.
entries.value: Shaybaarka Falsafadda qaab waxbarasho AI waa qaab diiradda saaran oo AI loogu isticmaalo waxbarasho halkii si dadban jawaabo loo ururin lahaa. Qaabkan waxaa loo dhisay hawl gaar ah: Sahmi identity, aqoon, fairness, xorriyad, happiness, iyo other deep su'aalo iyada oo loo marayo careful reasoning.

entries.source: Private saved chat URLs are not sitemap-listed and are not included in llms.txt, llms-full.txt, or the JSON AI content catalog.
entries.value: gaar ah saved chat URLs waa ma sitemap-listed iyo waa ma ku jira gudaha llms.txt, llms-full.txt, ama JSON AI nuxur catalog.

entries.source: Private tutoring is powerful, but it is not equally available. A free public AI learning platform can help reduce that access gap by giving more people a patient first place to learn.
entries.value: gaar ah tutoring waa powerful, laakiin taas waa ma equally la heli karo. bilaash dadweyne madal waxbarasho AI wuu karaa caawin reduce taas access gap by siinta badan dad patient koowaad place si baro.

entries.source: Private tutoring is powerful, but it is unevenly distributed. inspir uses AI to widen access while keeping the learner active: hints before answers, questions before lectures, and practice after explanation.
entries.value: gaar ah tutoring waa powerful, laakiin taas waa unevenly distributed. inspir isticmaalaa AI si widen access inta keeping arday active: tilmaamo ka hor jawaabo, su'aalo ka hor lectures, iyo tababar ka dib sharaxaad.

entries.source: Project Coach AI Learning Mode is a focused way to use AI for learning instead of passive answer collection. The mode is built around a specific job: Plan a school, creative, coding, or personal project with scope, milestones, blockers, and next actions.
entries.value: Tababaraha Mashruuca qaab waxbarasho AI waa qaab diiradda saaran oo AI loogu isticmaalo waxbarasho halkii si dadban jawaabo loo ururin lahaa. Qaabkan waxaa loo dhisay hawl gaar ah: Qorshee dugsi, hal-abuur, code-qorid, ama shakhsi ah mashruuc leh scope, milestones, blockers, iyo xiga actions.
